buildGraph(List<City>, Criteria) - Method in class com.transportapp.graph.BuildGraph
Builds a graph from the provided list of cities and a given optimization criterion.
BuildGraph - Class in com.transportapp.graph
Utility class responsible for constructing a graph from a list of cities and their transport data.
BuildGraph() - Constructor for class com.transportapp.graph.BuildGraph
 
busStation - Variable in class com.transportapp.model.Station
The name or identifier of the bus station.
